Mortificator Staff  
 

Lore Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 2H Blunt Atk Delay: 44
DMG: 16 Dmg Bonus: 152
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
WIS: +7 MANA: +45
Effect: Mana Sink (Combat, Casting Time: Instant) at Level 30
WT: 6.5 Size: LARGE
Class: SHM
Race: BAR ELF TRL OGR IKS VAH FRG
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)
Mortificator Staff
Lore Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 2H Blunt Atk Delay: 44
DMG: 16 Dmg Bonus: 152
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.

The effect on this item is Mana sink. Not manasink

Easy as pie
QuoteReply
# Jan 20 2003 at 9:05 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593362289105
View User Forum
12 posts
I ran into RM from Feerrot, saw this lizard, rooted him, dotted him with 3 different dots, waited 20 seconds, looted the staff and ran off to the giants... And I was using a lvl 54 druid.
▲ Page top
Bought 500 sell 10k?
QuoteReply
# Jul 02 2002 at 8:47 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591779632655
37 posts
What have you been smoking?
A true shaman never gonna melee with this slow staff just to get a few proc.
noobs today amazed me
▲ Page top
Mortificator Staff
QuoteReply
# Jun 07 2002 at 6:55 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592254779253
1 post
What can i say just happen to be running back into HG alley from a sale run and this lizard pops up on my guildies track...was easy work for me being a lvl 45 warrior. Just kept hitting him with my slam and he couldn't cast his dot. Got lucky on this baby and I am looking to sell it on Solusek Ro server. Gimme a tell if you got the cash!
▲ Page top
was just resting
QuoteReply
# Mar 21 2002 at 4:19 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591769531492
7 posts
Well i went to go hunt some Hill Giants one night, i barely zoned into Rathe from Feerot, walked down the straight path a little like i always do to head to the HG area. I sat down to med for a bit, got some snacks, wasn't really paying attention, then this lizard starts hitting me. Thought it was just some lizardman trying to pick on me because i was sitting down, then i noticed it was alot taller and had a stick with a skull on the end. He poisoned me and i noticed he was hasted really well, by this time i knew i had a tough fight on my hands. I'm a 50 paladin and solo'd him down using lay hands. The problem was i was ready to fight HG's, not casters so i didn't have any stuns up and i didn't have my 1hs and shield ready to interupt his healing spells. I had to zone from his pet after i killed him with only 80hp and poisoned. Atleast i lived and got his stick.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: May 27 2002 at 5:43 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Hey i am a 14th season shaman , this lady that was taking me to oasis, she told me that she had mortificator staff, i asked how much, 500pp!!!, i bought it and now wish to sell it for the near 10k's, if u want it send me a tell on lanys =)
Race
QuoteReply
# Jan 30 2002 at 7:15 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591765751980
49 posts
Iksar and vah Shir can now use this staff too :)
▲ Page top
Need expert advice!
QuoteReply
# Dec 17 2001 at 1:37 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592247022121
Scholar
33 posts
I'm a 49 Shammy and have the Mortificator Staff but need to gain more wis for the two slots the staff occupies. I would like to at least get an Ebon War Spear for my range slot and a Jade Chokidai Prod along with a Charred Guardian Shield.

My dilemma is that I don't want to sell my current staff to afford the other items I need.

Should I just save the money to get the items I covet and then sell my Mortificator Staff or is there another viable alternative route I should explore?

I can't afford to lose the wis and mana my staff affords until I get the items to replace it.

If anyone has any good ideas I'd be glad to hear them.
▲ Page top

▲ Page top
i got it
QuoteReply
# Jun 23 2001 at 11:33 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591753892693
2 posts
i just picked it up...was in rathe western part of hg valley near tower...was oom at the time..45 druid..he started to whoop me...rooted and got outta range to med( had clarity) was doing firn til his pet popped..then my no mana situation came into play...ran to chanter buddy...gave him all the pp on me when i saw stats..314pp it wasss..now i give staff to my shammy buddy..hope this helps
btw..this guy heals himself quite well
▲ Page top
mort staff
QuoteReply
# May 27 2001 at 5:35 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Everyone says 100pt mana drain, does that mean it just takes the mana from the target.. or does it actually give mana to the user?
▲ Page top
Level of Proc?
QuoteReply
# May 08 2001 at 3:07 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Ok from what i've read, the Staff drops from Mortificator Syythrak the named lizard, he's a level 39 Shaman and pretty nasty too.

One theory to get him to spawn is smack all the lizards on the Bandit hill between gypsies and rathetear zone and sit back and wait.

I was hunting that hill for giant skeletons and cyclops once with my 29 cleric and the morti walked past, did a U-turn and started casting hell out of our group. The dots didn't hurt a lot, it wasn't until his unsowed pet turned up on the scene and he started casting DDs when we got fried. Was not a pretty sight.

Anyway i plan to get this staff for my shaman newbie, what level does this staff proc at, any ideas?
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: May 08 2001 at 3:08 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Ack forgot my sig
Good for dueling Casters
QuoteReply
# Apr 28 2001 at 10:26 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
This is a good weapon for dueling caster types or any mana users. Drains there mana and from my test of it in a duel, if I remember right it was about 100pts of mana. I could be wrong but in any case pretty funny to watch someone's reaction when dueling and when they notice there mana draining with out them casting. Tee-Hee. :) That is if you can get it to proc good.
▲ Page top
RE: Good for dueling Casters
QuoteReply
# Jan 10 2002 at 8:15 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591771233377
View User Forum
11 posts
I am so sick and tired of hearing people talk about stuff like they know everything.. And telling big stories that are nothing more than rambling lies.!! For all who wants to know what Mana Sink is please look at the wizards line of spells lvl 57-or-58 spell it is not a stinkin mana drain spell..Damn people save the stories for the camp fire.

Kreeze 35 shaman Morrell-Thule.
▲ Page top
RE: Good for dueling Casters
QuoteReply
# Jan 20 2002 at 8:41 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1659313145154
Scholar
21 posts
You're thinking of Manasink, without the space.

Mana Sink (With the space between Mana _ Sink)
Decrease Mana from 12 (L1) to 130 (L60)

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Classes: None

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Skill: Instantaneous
Allowable Targets: All

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Range to Target: 300 feet

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Resistance Check: Magic

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Spell Duration: Instant

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Spell cast on you: Your mind clouds.
Spell cast on someone: Soandso winces.

Anonymous

#Anonymous, Posted: Mar 06 2001 at 3:48 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post)

# Feb 01 2001 at 9:13 AM Rating: Decent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Left over from the days that bards were thought to be able to use caster weapons. They must have plugged in the wrong template. Come to think about it, what bard uses a 2HB? Their 2HB skill is capped at 1 (no improvement possible)!
